title: cryptantha humilis
intro: Cryptantha humilis, also known as low cryptantha, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cryptantha humilis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
